text:
おつかれさん。
徹底的に殺ってきたみたいだね。

これで少しは静かになっただろ。
ま、すぐに増えるんだろうけど。

ダーカーを根絶しないかぎり
静かになんてならないしね。

とりあえず報酬を渡しとくよ。
機会があったらまたよ

Good work.
Looks like you scrubbed them out nicely.

Things'll probably quiet down a bit, now...
Though I'm sure more will appear before long.

We won't have any peace and quiet until all
Falspawn are completely eradicated.

Anyway, here's your reward.
Come back again when you have the chance.
